revision_history.effect: froze theorem premises with Pres_i and Faithful_m8 signatures incomplete
completed PRM-011 and PRM-012 through FAITHFUL-REP-001 without changing source scope, target interface, theorem family, or P8 alternatives

entries.statement: The source-domain classes D1-D16, boundary cases, observability strata, and revision rules are those of Reasoning Domain Specification v1.0.
An IRD process presentation is P=(T,X,H,O,K,Q,Delta,Gamma,support) and a reasoning episode satisfies R1-R6.
The first representation theorem quantifies over S_core, the finite explicit IRD-001 episode class, not over all S_IRD.
entries.revision_trigger: proof or countermodel shows the restriction is unnecessary, insufficiently precise, or still intractable

entries.statement: Every S_core episode has a finite event region and finite explicit carrier sets for every distinction material to R1-R6 and the registered preservation obligations.
S_core dynamics are explicit finite relations or finite-support probability kernels, with explicit grounds, support, and material history.
A theorem-facing FARA package is A=(U,Pi,R,Rep,S,I,Inv,C,Sigma,Theta,H,Omega,Res,Prov).
entries.note: This is an interface over existing canonical FARA concepts, not a new primitive basis.

entries.statement: Canonical meanings of representation, representational structure, interpretation, investigation, reasoning calculus, state, transition, admissibility, and resolution are imported from Project FAR definitions and FARA v1.0.
A representation witness is W=(E,D,M,iota,kappa), including encoding, declared recovery, correspondence map, semantic agreement, and complete machinery ledger.
PB-001 P1-P7 supply the provisional internal preservation obligations for configuration, commitment, stake and alternatives, grounds and justification, dynamics, consequences, and history.
entries.nonclaim: PB-001 sufficiency and independence are not established

entries.statement: P8 must be resolved as coordinate, side condition, or split internal/external correspondence obligation before a representation proof is accepted.

Pres_i holds exactly when admissible target-only recovery yields an axis reduct into which the applicable material source reduct has a total typed strong embedding preserving and reflecting registered relations and attributes.
entries.note: The definition includes axis-specific bisimulation and order-embedding clauses and does not assert that a witness exists.

entries.statement: Faithful_m8 is the frozen conjunction of source, target, and witness well-formedness; admissible recovery; all applicable Pres_1-Pres_7 predicates; the selected P8 clause; semantic agreement; cross-axis coherence; uniformity; compositional accountability; complete machinery accounting; and formal nontriviality.
entries.note: P8 mode selection and theorem satisfiability remain open.

entries.statement: A theorem about a mathematical presentation does not by itself establish correspondence to an actual physical, human, institutional, or machine process.
Application to an actual process requires a separately justified process-to-presentation correspondence at an appropriate observability or evidence grade.

The representation constructor and recovery family must be fixed and source-isomorphism equivariant over the declared class; all source-specific machinery must appear as target data or in the complete machinery ledger.

Label-only maps, output-only lookup, opaque universal state, hidden interpreters, metadata smuggling, evaluator repair, history erasure, evidential upgrading, and incoherent per-axis encodings are inadmissible witnesses.
There exists one fixed FARA interface schema and one uniform construction method eligible for every S_core source object.
Every S_core source object admits a faithful FARA target witness after the P8 mode and faithful predicate are frozen.
The finite-core result may extend to S_IRD.
The admissible reconstruction class for primitive necessity has not been defined.
The candidate universe, equivalence relation, and cost preorder for minimality and uniqueness have not been defined.
No substantive axiom asserting FARA adequacy, PB-001 completeness, primitive necessity, or universal reasoning structure is accepted in this target.

open_items: candidate universe and equivalence relation for minimality
nonclaims: the premises are all true of every actual reasoning process
the open theorem parameters are resolved
